name: Crusader Automated Defense System
desc: Military facilities that automatically replicate standard automated ships of the Crusader Design, granting the market powerful system defense capabilities.

name: Crusader Deep Space Mining System
desc: This deep space mining system deploys autonomous fleets to extract mineral resources from all star systems within 35 light-years, providing a steady stream of raw industrial materials.

name: Red Stripe Knights 1st Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: Maintains a Guard fleet dedicated to system defense and containing the flagship of the Order's armed forces.

name: Red Stripe Knights 2nd Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: Maintains an extremely powerful Guard fleet.

name: Red Stripe Knights 3rd Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: Maintains an extremely powerful Guard fleet, tasked primarily with testing and deploying experimental military equipment.
